content: By aligning the standardized open structure of the Model Context Protocol with the hierarchical episodic-semantic memory architecture of 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agents, we can create a interoperable, plug-and-play active agent memory ecosystem that lets different active learning agents dynamically import and export structured memory contexts across platforms and model backends. This allows any active learning agent to leverage accumulated long-horizon interaction memory from other agents without costly retraining or architecture overhauls.
